_comment: ANC test configuration. Keys prefixed with '_comment' are documentation only and ignored at runtime.

anc._comment_description: Human-readable label for this suite; shown in logs/reports.
anc._comment_test_timeout: Per-group execution timeout in seconds (7200 = 2 hours). ANC is killed if a group exceeds this.
anc._comment_anc_version: Expected ANC version. The install pre-task skips (re)installation when this version is already present on the node, and post-verifies the install matches.
anc._comment_anc_release_url: URL of the ANC release archive to download and install. Flavour (deb/rpm/tar) is auto-detected from the filename.
anc._comment_cvs_home: Working/install root on each node. '{home}' resolves to the SSH user's home directory.
anc._comment_anc_root_dir: Directory name under cvs_home where ANC is staged.
anc._comment_print_all_to_console: 'True' echoes ANC group output to the console; 'False' suppresses it (install/ldconfig/version diagnostics still print).
anc._comment_log_folder_path: Controller-side destination for collected ANC logs. '{home}' -> /home/<userid>; '<node>' -> the node's '<ip>_<hostname>' label (put it before '<test_name>' so multi-node runs group each node's tests together); '<test_name>' -> the group's test name (e.g. test_ampttk_full); '<timestamp>' -> per-run stamp (appended automatically if omitted).
anc._comment_ADD_ANC_LOGS_TO_HTML_REPORTS: 'True' always bundles the collected ANC log tree into the pytest-html report zip. 'False' (default) bundles it only when the test fails, so passing runs stay lean while failures always carry their logs.
anc._comment_COLLECT_HTML_REPORTS: 'True' (default) auto-generates a pytest-html report even when no --html is passed on the command line, written to html_report_path. 'False' disables auto-collection (a report is produced only if you pass --html explicitly). An explicit --html on the command line always overrides html_report_path.
anc._comment_html_report_path: Destination directory template for the auto-collected HTML report (the report file <test_name>.html is placed inside). Same tokens as log_folder_path. Because pytest-html makes ONE report per session before any node connects, '<node>' here resolves to the FIRST cluster node (label built from the cluster file only, no SSH).
